texto: It's a little known fact that one in three family pets gets lost during its lifetime, and approximately 9 million pets enter shelters each year. texto: I'm not into animal rights. I'm only into animal welfare and health. I've been with the Morris Animal Foundation since the '70s. We're a health organization.
